Name: UMediaPlayer
Description: Implements a media player asset that can play movies and other media sources.

Variables.Name: CacheAhead
Variables.Description:
Duration of samples to cache ahead of the play head.
	 
	  @see CacheBehind, CacheBehindGame

Variables.Name: CacheBehind
Variables.Description:
Duration of samples to cache behind the play head (when not running as game).
	 
	  @see CacheAhead, CacheBehindGame

Variables.Name: CacheBehindGame
Variables.Description:
Duration of samples to cache behind the play head (when running as game).
	 
	  @see CacheAhead, CacheBehind

Variables.Name: NativeAudioOut
Variables.Description:
Output any audio via the operating system's sound mixer instead of a Sound Wave asset.
	 
	  If enabled, the assigned Sound Wave asset will be ignored. The SetNativeVolume
	  function can then be used to change the audio output volume at runtime. Note that
	  not all media player plug-ins may support native audio output on all platforms.
	 
	  @see SetNativeVolume

Variables.Name: PlayOnOpen
Variables.Description:
Automatically start playback after media opened successfully.
	 
	  If disabled, listen to the OnMediaOpened Blueprint event to detect when
	  the media finished opening, and then start playback using the Play function.
	 
	  @see OpenFile, OpenPlaylist, OpenPlaylistIndex, OpenSource, OpenUrl, Play

Variables.Name: Shuffle
Variables.Description:
Whether playback should shuffle media sources in the play list.
	 
	  @see OpenPlaylist, OpenPlaylistIndex

Variables.Name: Loop
Playlist
PlaylistIndex
HorizontalFieldOfView
Variables.Description:
The initial horizontal field of view (in Euler degrees; default = 90).
	 
	  This setting is used only for 360 videos. It determines the portion of the
	  video that is visible at a time. To modify the field of view at runtime in
	  Blueprints, use the SetHorizontalFieldOfView function.
	 
	  @see GetHorizontalFieldOfView, SetHorizontalFieldOfView, VerticalFieldOfView, ViewRotation

Variables.Name: VerticalFieldOfView
Variables.Description:
The initial vertical field of view (in Euler degrees; default = 60).
	 
	  This setting is used only for 360 videos. It determines the portion of the
	  video that is visible at a time. To modify the field of view at runtime in
	  Blueprints, use the SetHorizontalFieldOfView function.
	 
	  Please note that some 360 video players may be able to change only the
	  horizontal field of view, and this setting may be ignored.
	 
	  @see GetVerticalFieldOfView, SetVerticalFieldOfView, HorizontalFieldOfView, ViewRotation

Variables.Name: ViewRotation
Variables.Description:
The initial view rotation.
	 
	  This setting is used only for 360 videos. It determines the rotation of
	  the video's view. To modify the view orientation at runtime in Blueprints,
	  use the GetViewRotation and SetViewRotation functions.
	 
	  Please note that not all players may support video view rotations.
	 
	  @see GetViewRotation, SetViewRotation, HorizontalFieldOfView, VerticalFieldOfView

Functions.Name: CanPause
Functions.Description:
Check whether media playback can be paused right now.
	 
	  Playback can be paused if the media supports pausing and if it is currently playing.

Return.Description: true if pausing playback can be paused, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: CanPlaySource
Functions.Description:
Check whether the specified media source can be played by this player.
	 
	  If a desired player name is set for this player, it will only check
	  whether that particular player type can play the specified source.

Params.Name: MediaSource
Params.Description: The media source to check.

Return.Description: true if the media source can be opened, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: CanPlayUrl
Functions.Description:
Check whether the specified URL can be played by this player.
	 
	  If a desired player name is set for this player, it will only check
	  whether that particular player type can play the specified URL.

Params.Name: Url
Params.Description: The URL to check.

Functions.Name: Close
Functions.Description: Close the currently open media, if any.

Functions.Name: GetAudioTrackChannels
Functions.Description: Get the number of channels in the specified audio track.

Params.Name: TrackIndex
Params.Description: Index of the audio track, or INDEX_NONE for the selected one.

Params.Name: FormatIndex
Params.Description: Index of the track format, or INDEX_NONE for the selected one.

Return.Description: Number of channels.

Functions.Name: GetAudioTrackSampleRate
Functions.Description: Get the sample rate of the specified audio track.

Params.Name: TrackIndex
Params.Description: Index of the audio track, or INDEX_NONE for the selected one.

Params.Name: FormatIndex
Params.Description: Index of the track format, or INDEX_NONE for the selected one.

Return.Description: Samples per second.

Functions.Name: GetAudioTrackType
Functions.Description: Get the type of the specified audio track format.

Params.Name: TrackIndex
Params.Description: The index of the track, or INDEX_NONE for the selected one.

Params.Name: FormatIndex
Params.Description: Index of the track format, or INDEX_NONE for the selected one.

Return.Description: Audio format type string.

Functions.Name: GetDesiredPlayerName
Functions.Description: Get the name of the current desired native player.

Return.Description: The name of the desired player, or NAME_None if not set.

Functions.Name: GetDuration
Functions.Description: Get the media's duration.

Return.Description: A time span representing the duration.

Functions.Name: GetHorizontalFieldOfView
Functions.Description: Get the current horizontal field of view (only for 360 videos).

Return.Description: Horizontal field of view (in Euler degrees).

Functions.Name: GetMediaName
Functions.Description: Get the human readable name of the currently loaded media source.

Return.Description: Media source name, or empty text if no media is opened

Functions.Name: GetNumTracks
Functions.Description: Get the number of tracks of the given type.

Params.Name: TrackType
Params.Description: The type of media tracks.

Return.Description: Number of tracks.

Functions.Name: GetNumTrackFormats
Functions.Description: Get the number of formats of the specified track.

Params.Name: TrackType
Params.Description: The type of media tracks.

Params.Name: TrackIndex
Params.Description: The index of the track.

Return.Description: Number of formats.

Functions.Name: GetPlayerName
Functions.Description: Get the name of the current native media player.

Return.Description: Player name, or NAME_None if not available.

Functions.Name: GetPlaylist
Functions.Description:
Get the current play list.
	 
	  Media players always have a valid play list. In C++ code you can use
	  the GetPlaylistRef to get a reference instead of a pointer to it.

Return.Description: The play list.

Functions.Name: GetPlaylistIndex
Functions.Description: Get the current play list index.

Return.Description: Play list index.

Functions.Name: GetRate
Functions.Description: Get the media's current playback rate.

Return.Description: The playback rate.

Functions.Name: GetSelectedTrack
Functions.Description: Get the index of the currently selected track of the given type.

Params.Name: TrackType
Params.Description: The type of track to get.

Return.Description: The index of the selected track, or INDEX_NONE if no track is active.

Functions.Name: GetSupportedRates
Functions.Description: Get the supported playback rates.

Params.Name: Unthinned
Params.Description: Whether the rates are for unthinned playback.

Functions.Name: GetTime
Functions.Description: Get the media's current playback time.

Return.Description: Playback time.

Functions.Name: GetTrackDisplayName
Functions.Description: Get the human readable name of the specified track.

Params.Name: TrackType
Params.Description: The type of track.

Params.Name: TrackIndex
Params.Description: The index of the track, or INDEX_NONE for the selected one.

Return.Description: Display name.

Functions.Name: GetTrackFormat
Functions.Description: Get the index of the active format of the specified track type.

Params.Name: TrackType
Params.Description: The type of track.

Params.Name: TrackIndex
Params.Description: The index of the track, or INDEX_NONE for the selected one.

Return.Description: The index of the selected format.

Functions.Name: GetTrackLanguage
Functions.Description: Get the language tag of the specified track.

Params.Name: TrackType
Params.Description: The type of track.

Params.Name: TrackIndex
Params.Description: The index of the track, or INDEX_NONE for the selected one.

Return.Description: Language tag, i.e. "en-US" for English, or "und" for undefined.

Functions.Name: GetUrl
Functions.Description: Get the URL of the currently loaded media, if any.

Return.Description: Media URL, or empty string if no media was loaded.

Functions.Name: GetVerticalFieldOfView
Functions.Description: Get the current vertical field of view (only for 360 videos).

Return.Description: Vertical field of view (in Euler degrees), or 0.0 if not available.

Functions.Name: GetVideoTrackAspectRatio
Functions.Description: Get the aspect ratio of the specified video track.

Params.Name: TrackIndex
Params.Description: Index of the video track, or INDEX_NONE for the selected one.

Params.Name: FormatIndex
Params.Description: Index of the track format, or INDEX_NONE for the selected one.

Return.Description: Aspect ratio.

Functions.Name: GetVideoTrackDimensions
Functions.Description: Get the current dimensions of the specified video track.

Params.Name: TrackIndex
Params.Description: The index of the track, or INDEX_NONE for the selected one.

Params.Name: FormatIndex
Params.Description: Index of the track format, or INDEX_NONE for the selected one.

Return.Description: Video dimensions (in pixels).

Functions.Name: GetVideoTrackFrameRate
Functions.Description: Get the frame rate of the specified video track.

Params.Name: TrackIndex
Params.Description: The index of the track, or INDEX_NONE for the selected one.

Params.Name: FormatIndex
Params.Description: Index of the track format, or INDEX_NONE for the selected one.

Return.Description: Frame rate (in frames per second).

Functions.Name: GetVideoTrackFrameRates
Functions.Description: Get the supported range of frame rates of the specified video track.

Params.Name: TrackIndex
Params.Description: The index of the track, or INDEX_NONE for the selected one.

Params.Name: FormatIndex
Params.Description: Index of the track format, or INDEX_NONE for the selected one.

Return.Description: Frame rate range (in frames per second).

Functions.Name: GetVideoTrackType
Functions.Description: Get the type of the specified video track format.

Params.Name: TrackIndex
Params.Description: The index of the track, or INDEX_NONE for the selected one.

Params.Name: FormatIndex
Params.Description: Index of the track format, or INDEX_NONE for the selected one.

Return.Description: Video format type string.

Functions.Name: GetViewRotation
Functions.Description: Get the current view rotation (only for 360 videos).

Return.Description: View rotation, or zero rotator if not available.

Functions.Name: HasError
Functions.Description:
Check whether the player is in an error state.
	 
	  When the player is in an error state, no further operations are possible.
	  The current media must be closed, and a new media source must be opened
	  before the player can be used again. Errors are usually caused by faulty
	  media files or interrupted network connections.

Functions.Name: IsBuffering
Functions.Description: Check whether playback is buffering data.

Return.Description: true if looping, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: IsConnecting
Functions.Description: Check whether the player is currently connecting to a media source.

Return.Description: true if connecting, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: IsLooping
Functions.Description: Check whether playback is looping.

Return.Description: true if looping, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: IsPaused
Functions.Description: Check whether playback is currently paused.

Return.Description: true if playback is paused, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: IsPlaying
Functions.Description: Check whether playback has started.

Return.Description: true if playback has started, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: IsPreparing
Functions.Description: Check whether the media is currently opening or buffering.

Return.Description: true if playback is being prepared, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: IsReady
Functions.Description:
Check whether media is ready for playback.
	 
	  A player is ready for playback if it has a media source opened that
	  finished preparing and is not in an error state.

Return.Description: true if media is ready, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: Next
Functions.Description:
Open the next item in the current play list.
	 
	  The player will start playing the new media source if it was playing
	  something previously, otherwise it will only open the media source.

Return.Description: true on success, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: OpenFile
Functions.Description:
Opens the specified media file path.
	 
	  A return value of true indicates that the player will attempt to open
	  the media, but it may fail to do so later for other reasons, i.e. if
	  a connection to the media server timed out. Use the OnMediaOpened and
	  OnMediaOpenFailed delegates to detect if and when the media is ready!

Params.Name: FilePath
Params.Description: The file path to open.

Return.Description: true if the file path will be opened, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: OpenPlaylist
Functions.Description: Open the first media source in the specified play list.

Params.Name: InPlaylist
Params.Description: The play list to open.

Return.Description: true if the source will be opened, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: OpenPlaylistIndex
Functions.Description: Open a particular media source in the specified play list.

Params.Name: InPlaylist
Params.Description: The play list to open.

Params.Name: Index
Params.Description: The index of the source to open.

Return.Description: true if the source will be opened, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: OpenSource
Functions.Description:
Open the specified media source.
	 
	  A return value of true indicates that the player will attempt to open
	  the media, but it may fail to do so later for other reasons, i.e. if
	  a connection to the media server timed out. Use the OnMediaOpened and
	  OnMediaOpenFailed delegates to detect if and when the media is ready!

Params.Name: MediaSource
Params.Description: The media source to open.

Return.Description: true if the source will be opened, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: OpenUrl
Functions.Description:
Opens the specified media URL.
	 
	  A return value of true indicates that the player will attempt to open
	  the media, but it may fail to do so later for other reasons, i.e. if
	  a connection to the media server timed out. Use the OnMediaOpened and
	  OnMediaOpenFailed delegates to detect if and when the media is ready!

Params.Name: Url
Params.Description: The URL to open.

Return.Description: true if the URL will be opened, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: Pause
Functions.Description:
Pauses media playback.
	 
	  This is the same as setting the playback rate to 0.0.

Return.Description: true if playback is being paused, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: Play
Functions.Description:
Starts media playback.
	 
	  This is the same as setting the playback rate to 1.0.

Return.Description: true if playback is starting, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: Previous
Functions.Description:
Open the previous item in the current play list.
	 
	  The player will start playing the new media source if it was playing
	  something previously, otherwise it will only open the media source.

Return.Description: true on success, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: Reopen
Functions.Description: Reopens the currently opened media or play list.

Return.Description: true if the media will be opened, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: Rewind
Functions.Description:
Rewinds the media to the beginning.
	 
	  This is the same as seeking to zero time.

Return.Description: true if rewinding, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: Seek
Functions.Description: Seeks to the specified playback time.

Params.Name: Time
Params.Description: The playback time to set.

Return.Description: true on success, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: SelectTrack
Functions.Description:
Select the active track of the given type.
	 
	  The selected track will use its currently active format. Active formats will
	  be remembered on a per track basis. The first available format is active by
	  default. To switch the track format, use SetTrackFormat instead.

Params.Name: TrackType
Params.Description: The type of track to select.

Params.Name: TrackIndex
Params.Description: The index of the track to select, or INDEX_NONE to deselect.

Return.Description: true if the track was selected, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: SetDesiredPlayerName
Functions.Description: Set the name of the desired native player.

Params.Name: PlayerName
Params.Description: The name of the player to set.

Functions.Name: SetLooping
Functions.Description: Enables or disables playback looping.

Params.Name: Looping
Params.Description: Whether playback should be looped.

Return.Description: true on success, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: SetRate
Functions.Description: Changes the media's playback rate.

Params.Name: Rate
Params.Description: The playback rate to set.

Return.Description: true on success, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: SetNativeVolume
Functions.Description:
Set the volume on the native player if not mixing with Sound Wave asset.
	 
	  The SetNativeVolume can be used to change the audio output volume at runtime. Note that
	  not all media player plug-ins may support native audio output on all platforms.

Params.Name: Volume
Params.Description: The volume to set.

Return.Description: true on success, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: SetTrackFormat
Functions.Description:
Set the format on the specified track.
	 
	  Selecting the format will not switch to the specified track. To switch
	  tracks, use SelectTrack instead. If the track is already selected, the
	  format change will be applied immediately.

Params.Name: TrackType
Params.Description: The type of track to update.

Params.Name: TrackIndex
Params.Description: The index of the track to update.

Params.Name: FormatIndex
Params.Description: The index of the format to select (must be valid).

Return.Description: true if the track was selected, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: SetVideoTrackFrameRate
Functions.Description: Set the frame rate of the specified video track.

Params.Name: TrackIndex
Params.Description: The index of the track, or INDEX_NONE for the selected one.

Params.Name: FormatIndex
Params.Description: Index of the track format, or INDEX_NONE for the selected one.

Params.Name: FrameRate
Params.Description: The frame rate to set (must be in range of format's supported frame rates).

Return.Description: true on success, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: SetViewField
Functions.Description: Set the field of view (only for 360 videos).

Params.Name: Horizontal
Params.Description: Horizontal field of view (in Euler degrees).

Params.Name: Vertical
Params.Description: Vertical field of view (in Euler degrees).

Return.Description: true on success, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: SetViewRotation
Functions.Description: Set the view's rotation (only for 360 videos).

Params.Name: Rotation
Params.Description: The desired view rotation.

Return.Description: true on success, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: SupportsRate
Functions.Description: Check whether the specified playback rate is supported.

Params.Name: Rate
Params.Description: The playback rate to check.

Params.Name: Unthinned
Params.Description: Whether no frames should be dropped at the given rate.

Functions.Name: SupportsScrubbing
Functions.Description: Check whether the currently loaded media supports scrubbing.

Return.Description: true if scrubbing is supported, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: SupportsSeeking
Functions.Description: Check whether the currently loaded media can jump to a certain position.

Return.Description: true if seeking is supported, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: SetAudioDeviceGUID
Functions.Description:
Sets the audio device for the media player; currently only effective on PC platforms.
	  add by watsonxie

Delegate.Name: OnEndReached
Delegate.Description: A delegate that is invoked when playback has reached the end of the media.

Delegate.Name: OnMediaClosed
Delegate.Description: A delegate that is invoked when a media source has been closed.

Delegate.Name: OnMediaOpened
Delegate.Description:
A delegate that is invoked when a media source has been opened.
	 
	  Depending on whether the underlying player implementation opens the media
	  synchronously or asynchronously, this event may be executed before or
	  after the call to OpenSource  OpenUrl returns.

Delegate.Name: OnMediaOpenFailed
Delegate.Description:
A delegate that is invoked when a media source has failed to open.
	 
	  This delegate is only executed if OpenSource  OpenUrl returned true and
	  the media failed to open asynchronously later. It is not executed if
	  OpenSource  OpenUrl returned false, indicating an immediate failure.

Delegate.Name: OnPlaybackResumed
Delegate.Description: A delegate that is invoked when media playback has been resumed.

Delegate.Name: OnPlaybackSuspended
Delegate.Description: A delegate that is invoked when media playback has been suspended.

Delegate.Name: OnSeekCompleted
Delegate.Description:
A delegate that is invoked when a seek operation completed successfully.
	 
	  Depending on whether the underlying player implementation performs seeks
	  synchronously or asynchronously, this event may be executed before or
	  after the call to Seek returns.

Delegate.Name: OnTracksChanged
Delegate.Description: A delegate that is invoked when the media track collection changed.
